      public RoomBuilder(UUID uuid, Integer numOfBeds, BigDecimal pricePerNight)
      Constructor for RoomBuilder.
      Parameters:
      uuid - The uuid of the room, as UUID.
      numOfBeds - Number of beds in the room, as Integer.
      pricePerNight - Price for one night in euros, as BigDecimal.
